zh-tw.title: 星座語錄 × I人E人
zh-tw.description: 12星座的真實面貌，結合I人/E人視角，戳心又好笑的星座金句

en.title: Zodiac Quotes × Introvert/Extrovert Edition
en.description: Brutally honest zodiac personality quotes with an introvert/extrovert twist — relatable, funny, and a little too accurate

items.sourceNote: General Aries traits — impulsive, action-first, think-later personality

zh-tw.content:
牡羊座的人生座右銘：
先衝再說，後悔的事等衝完再慢慢想。

他們不是不考慮後果——只是覺得考慮太久也是一種浪費時間。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給身邊那個做什麼事都先衝的牡羊朋友，他大概會說「對啊所以呢」
variations: 牡羊座的計畫永遠只有第一步：「先做了再說」。第二步是什麼？不知道，到時候再看。

en.content:
Aries life motto:
Act first, regret later — but only after finishing what you started.

It's not that they don't think things through. It's that thinking too long also counts as wasted time.
en.editorNote: Send to your impulsive Aries friend. They'll probably respond: 'Yeah, and?'
variations: An Aries plan always has step one: 'Just go for it.' Step two? TBD. They'll figure it out on the way.

items.sourceNote: Taurus traits — stubborn, comfort-loving, slow to change but loyal

zh-tw.content:
金牛座不是固執——
只是他們找到了對的方式之後，就沒有理由再換。

你說的「嘗試新事物」，在金牛座看來叫做「製造不必要的風險」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在朋友說「你就是太固執了」的時候默默傳給他，不需要說什麼
variations: 金牛座的舒適圈不是逃避，是投資——他們花了很長時間才建起來的，為什麼要輕易放棄？

en.content:
Taurus isn't stubborn —
they just found what works and see no reason to change it.

What you call 'trying new things,' a Taurus calls 'introducing unnecessary variables.'
en.editorNote: Share when someone accuses a Taurus of being inflexible — let the quote do the talking
variations: A Taurus's comfort zone isn't avoidance — it's a long-term investment. They built it carefully. Why tear it down?

items.sourceNote: Gemini traits — dual personality, talkative, fast-switching energy

zh-tw.content:
雙子座今天說的話，明天不一定還算數。
不是他說謊——只是昨天的他跟今天的他，嚴格來說是兩個不同的人。

這叫做成長，請給予掌聲。
zh-tw.editorNote: 雙子座朋友看到這個通常會笑著說「沒錯就是這樣」
variations: 雙子座：「我昨天說的話我不認——昨天的我已經死了。」
和雙子座吵架記得截圖，因為隔天他可能完全不記得說過什麼了

en.content:
What a Gemini says today isn't necessarily valid tomorrow.
It's not that they're lying — the person from yesterday and the person today are technically two different people.

This is called growth. Please applaud.
en.editorNote: Geminis usually read this and immediately say 'That's literally me'
variations: Gemini: 'What I said yesterday doesn't count. That version of me is gone.'
When arguing with a Gemini, screenshot everything — by tomorrow they may have no memory of it.

items.sourceNote: Cancer traits — emotionally sensitive, protective, never forgets a slight

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座說「沒事」的時候，通常有很多事。
說「隨便你」的時候，通常是認真的在生氣。
說「我不在意了」的時候——
他們只是把在意的事收進了更深的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: I人的巨蟹座尤其符合，傳給那個說「我不在意」但眼神出賣一切的朋友
variations: 巨蟹座不記仇——他們只是記性很好，而且感情特別豐富。

en.content:
When a Cancer says 'it's fine,' there's usually quite a lot that isn't.
When they say 'do whatever you want,' they're actually pretty upset.
When they say 'I don't care anymore' —
they've just moved what they care about somewhere deeper.
en.editorNote: Especially true for introverted Cancers — send to the friend who says they're fine but their eyes say otherwise
variations: A Cancer doesn't hold grudges — they just have an excellent memory and a very rich emotional life.

items.sourceNote: Leo traits — confident, attention-seeking, generous but needs praise

zh-tw.content:
獅子座的自信不是表演出來的——
他們真的覺得自己很好，而且希望你也這樣覺得。

誇他一句，他能替你辦三件事。
不誇他，他也會辦，只是臉比較臭。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合用來解釋為什麼獅子座朋友需要被肯定，語氣輕鬆不傷感情
variations: 獅子座語錄：「我不是需要你誇我，只是……如果你誇的話，大家都會比較愉快。」

en.content:
Leo's confidence isn't a performance —
they genuinely think they're great, and they'd like you to think so too.

Compliment them once and they'll do three favors for you.
Skip it and they'll still help — just with a noticeably different expression.
en.editorNote: A good-natured way to explain why your Leo friend needs validation without making it an issue
variations: Leo self-summary: 'I don't need you to compliment me. But if you do, everyone's going to have a much better time.'

items.sourceNote: Virgo traits — perfectionist, detail-oriented, critical but well-meaning

zh-tw.content:
處女座看到不整齊的東西，手就會癢。
不是挑剔，是對品質有要求。

他們說的「你這樣不對」，翻譯成正常語言是：
「我很在乎你，所以忍不住說。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是幫你找錯誤的處女座朋友，讓他知道你懂他的好意
variations:
處女座的口頭禪：「我說幾句喔，你別介意。」
（一說通常超過三句，但每句都是為你好。）

en.content:
When a Virgo sees something out of place, they can't just leave it.
Not because they're picky — because they have standards.

When they say 'that's not quite right,' the translation is:
'I care about you enough to say something.'
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo who always spots your mistakes — let them know you get it
variations:
Virgo catchphrase: 'Not to criticize, but...' 
(What follows is usually more than one point. All of it meant kindly.)

items.sourceNote: Libra traits — indecisive, harmony-seeking, people-pleasing

zh-tw.content:
天秤座選菜單需要十五分鐘。
選要不要回覆那條訊息需要兩個小時。
選要不要結束一段關係需要三年。

不是沒有主見——每個選項在他們眼裡都太有道理了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在朋友選吃什麼選很久的時候傳，天秤座看到會笑又會有點臉紅
variations: 天秤座的決策流程：全部列出來，分析利弊，最後選了最不想選的那個，因為「感覺比較公平」。

en.content:
A Libra needs fifteen minutes to pick from a menu.
Two hours to decide whether to reply to that message.
Three years to end a relationship.

It's not that they lack opinions — every option just makes too much sense to them.
en.editorNote: Share when your Libra friend can't pick where to eat — they'll laugh and look a little guilty
variations: Libra decision process: list all options, weigh pros and cons, then choose the one they least wanted — because it 'seemed fairest.'

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — intense, secretive, deeply loyal but slow to trust

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座對你好的時候，你是全世界最重要的人。
天蠍座對你翻臉的時候，你才知道他有多記仇。

問題是，他們翻臉的門檻其實很高——所以如果翻了，通常是你真的做了什麼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 天蠍座朋友的最佳辯護詞，傳給那個覺得天蠍座可怕的人
variations: 天蠍座：「我不是記仇。我只是不忘記。這兩件事是不一樣的。」

en.content:
When a Scorpio is on your side, you're the most important person in the world.
When they cut you off, you'll understand why everyone warns about them.

The thing is — their threshold for turning is actually quite high. If it happened, you probably did something.
en.editorNote: The best defense of a Scorpio friend — send to whoever's intimidated by them
variations: Scorpio: 'I don't hold grudges. I just don't forget. Those are two different things.'

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius traits — freedom-loving, blunt, always planning the next adventure

zh-tw.content:
射手座說的「我們改天再聚」，有時候真的是改天，有時候是禮貌性結束對話。

不過他們邀你去玩的時候是真的——射手座不會浪費時間邀請不想一起的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 射手座朋友看到這個大概會說「對我就是這樣，問題嗎？」
variations: 射手座的友誼守則：我可以消失三個月，但我心裡一直有你。你想找我，我馬上出現。

en.content:
When a Sagittarius says 'let's catch up sometime,' it's sometimes genuine, sometimes a polite conversation closer.

But when they invite you somewhere, they mean it — a Sagittarius doesn't waste time inviting people they don't actually want around.
en.editorNote: A Sagittarius will probably read this and say 'Yep, that's me, any questions?'
variations: Sagittarius friendship code: I might disappear for three months, but you're still in my head. Text me and I'll show up.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn traits — hardworking, ambitious, takes life very seriously

zh-tw.content:
魔羯座放假也在想工作。
躺平的時候腦子裡在跑下季計畫。
玩樂的時候算著這頓飯值不值這個時間成本。

他們不是不懂享受——他們只是把享受也列進了待辦事項裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給那個休假還在回工作訊息的魔羯座，幫他們說出自己的狀態
variations: 魔羯座的週末計畫：把下週的事先做完，然後好好休息一個小時，然後繼續做下下週的事。

en.content:
A Capricorn thinks about work even on vacation.
While lying down, their brain is running Q3 projections.
While eating out, they're calculating whether the meal is worth the time cost.

They're not incapable of relaxing — they've just put 'relaxing' on the to-do list.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn who's answering emails on their day off — it perfectly describes them
variations: Capricorn weekend plan: finish next week's tasks first, then rest for an hour, then get started on the week after that.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius traits — independent, unconventional, feels misunderstood

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座不是不合群——
他們只是需要先確認這個群值得加入。

大多數時候，判斷結果是：不值得，還是自己比較自在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 水瓶座I人看到這個會沉默兩秒，然後說「對。」這就是他們最標準的反應
variations: 水瓶座的社交哲學：與其花力氣融入不對的圈子，不如把那個力氣留給值得的人。

en.content:
Aquarius isn't antisocial —
they just need to verify that a group is worth joining before they do.

Most of the time, the verdict is: not really, and they're more comfortable on their own.
en.editorNote: An introverted Aquarius will pause for two seconds after reading this, then say 'Correct.' That's the full response.
variations: Aquarius social philosophy: why spend energy fitting in somewhere wrong when you can save it for someone who's worth it?

items.sourceNote: Pisces traits — dreamy, empathetic, lost in their own world

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座有時候不是在發呆——
他們只是在一個你進不去的地方認真思考。

等他們回來，通常什麼事都解決了，或是什麼事都忘了，這兩種機率差不多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 雙魚座的最強自我解釋，傳給那個說雙魚座「不在狀況」的朋友
variations: 雙魚座的世界裡，感覺比邏輯更可靠。他們不是算不清楚，只是覺得「感覺對」比「算對」更重要。

en.content:
Sometimes a Pisces isn't spacing out —
they're just thinking very seriously somewhere you can't follow.

When they come back, either everything is resolved or everything is forgotten. Roughly equal odds.
en.editorNote: The definitive Pisces self-defense — send to the friend who says Pisces are 'out of it'
variations: In a Pisces's world, feelings are more reliable than logic. They can do the math — they just trust 'feels right' more than 'calculated correctly.'

items.sourceNote: I人/E人 MBTI × zodiac crossover — introvert signs at social events

zh-tw.content:
星座I人在派對上的內心OS：
「我來了，我待夠了，我可以回家了。」

從進門到離場，這三個念頭平均間隔二十分鐘。

（巨蟹、處女、天蠍、水瓶請自行對號入座。）
zh-tw.editorNote: 群組裡一定有這種人，傳出去之後他們只會回一個「笑哭」然後默默繼續滑手機
variations: I人派對生存包：一杯飲料（道具用）、一個常用離場理由、手機備好電——這樣就夠了。

en.content:
Introverted zodiac signs at a party, inner monologue:
'Arrived. Stayed long enough. Time to go home.'

Average interval between these three thoughts: twenty minutes.

(Cancer, Virgo, Scorpio, Aquarius — you know who you are.)
en.editorNote: Every friend group has this person — send it and they'll respond with a laughing emoji then go back to scrolling
variations: Introvert party survival kit: one drink (as a prop), one reliable exit excuse, fully charged phone — that's all you need.

items.sourceNote: Fire signs (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius) group personality — E人 energy

zh-tw.content:
火象星座（牡羊、獅子、射手）有個共同點：
他們不太會說「好累，算了」。

說了也不算，十分鐘後又衝回去了。

這不叫沒有自覺，叫做熱情比記憶力強。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說「好了好了不幹了」然後隔天照樣出現的火象座朋友
variations: 火象星座的放棄：「我不玩了！（五分鐘後）……好我繼續。」

en.content:
Fire signs (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius) share one thing:
they don't really mean it when they say 'I'm done, forget it.'

They say it, but ten minutes later they're back in it.

Not a lack of self-awareness — just passion that outlasts their own complaints.
en.editorNote: Send to the fire sign friend who quit three times this week and showed up again every time
variations: Fire sign 'giving up': 'That's it, I'm out!' (five minutes later) '...Okay, one more round.'

items.sourceNote: Water signs (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces) — emotional depth, feeling everything

zh-tw.content:
水象星座（巨蟹、天蠍、雙魚）感受到的一切，都是真實的。

你說的那句話，他們確實記得。
那首歌響起的時候，他們確實難過了一下。
你以為的小事，對他們來說從來不是小事。

這是一種天賦，只是有時候自己也很累。
zh-tw.editorNote: 水象座朋友看到這個很可能會說「謝謝你懂我」，然後眼眶有點紅
variations: 水象星座不是太敏感——只是他們的心沒有靜音鍵。

en.content:
Everything water signs (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces) feel is real.

That thing you said — they actually remember it.
When that song comes on, they genuinely felt something for a moment.
What you call a small thing was never small to them.

It's a gift. It just gets exhausting sometimes.
en.editorNote: A water sign friend might read this and say 'thank you for getting it' — possibly with wet eyes
variations: Water signs aren't too sensitive — their heart just doesn't have a mute button.

items.sourceNote: Earth signs (Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn) — reliability and quiet steadiness

zh-tw.content:
土象星座（金牛、處女、魔羯）有一個很少被提到的特質：

他們很可靠。
說了就做，承諾了就算。

在社交場合不一定最亮眼，
但在你最需要的時候，
他們通常就在那裡——沒有特別宣告，就是在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你生命中那個默默在支撐你的土象座朋友，讓他知道你看見了
variations: 土象星座的存在感不是「最吵的那個」，是「等你回頭才發現一直在的那個」。

en.content:
Earth signs (Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn) have a quality that rarely gets talked about:

They're reliable.
They say it, they do it. They promise, it counts.

They may not be the brightest presence in the room,
but when you need someone —
they're usually already there. No announcement. Just there.
en.editorNote: Send to the earth sign friend who's been quietly showing up for you — let them know you see it
variations: Earth signs don't make the most noise. They're the ones you turn around and realize have been there the whole time.

items.sourceNote: Air signs (Gemini, Libra, Aquarius) — overthinking, tangents, cerebral energy

zh-tw.content:
風象星座（雙子、天秤、水瓶）的大腦永遠在運轉。

他們能同時想七件事，
卻偶爾忘記今天要幹嘛。

你問他一件事，他給你一個很精彩的答案——
但那個答案是另一個問題的。

這不叫沒在聽，叫做超前思考，
只是方向有時候偏了一點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次說話都要先繞一大圈的風象座朋友，他看完大概會說「但我覺得我的邏輯是對的」
variations: 和風象星座對話的訣竅：讓他說完，然後再把話題帶回來。這個迴路通常在三分鐘內完成。

en.content:
Air signs' (Gemini, Libra, Aquarius) brains are always running.

They can think seven things at once,
and occasionally forget what they were supposed to do today.

You ask them something, and they give you a brilliant answer —
just not to your question.

It's not that they weren't listening.
It's advanced thinking. The direction just drifted slightly.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who always takes three detours before getting to the point — they'll probably say 'but my logic was correct'
variations: Tip for talking to air signs: let them finish, then gently steer back. The loop usually completes in under three minutes.

items.sourceNote: Chaotic zodiac couple pairings — funny but sweet

zh-tw.content:
牡羊說「走吧」，
金牛說「等等，我還沒準備好」。

雙魚說「你決定就好」，
天秤說「那你決定吧」。

——以上是最讓人崩潰的四種配對反應，
但他們通常是最甜的那種，
因為一個永遠都在等，一個永遠都在讓。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你身邊的牡羊金牛CP或雙魚天秤CP，他們看到大概會互相傳給對方說「你看這就是你」
variations: 所有配對裡最有趣的：衝衝衝的火象配上慢慢來的土象——永遠在趕跟永遠在等，但他們覺得這樣剛好。

en.content:
Aries says 'let's go,'
Taurus says 'wait, I'm not ready yet.'

Pisces says 'whatever you decide is fine,'
Libra says 'no, you decide.'

— These are four of the most chaotic pairings to watch,
but they tend to be the sweetest ones —
because one always waits, and one always yields.
en.editorNote: Send to an Aries-Taurus or Pisces-Libra couple — they'll immediately forward it to each other saying 'this is literally you'
variations: Most entertaining combo: the always-rushing fire sign paired with the always-slow earth sign. Perpetually hurrying and perpetually waiting — and somehow it works perfectly for them.

items.sourceNote: I人/E人 MBTI texting style contrast

zh-tw.content:
E人的訊息長這樣：
「等等你在嗎？今天怎麼樣？你吃飯了嗎？對了你有沒有看那個——算了先說這個——你最近還好嗎？」

I人的訊息長這樣：
「哈」

I人的「哈」翻譯：
我看到你的訊息了、我有在、我很開心聽到你的聲音、我不知道怎麼說，所以我傳了一個哈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你的I人朋友，他大概會回你一個「哈」——然後你就知道他看完了而且很懂
variations: I人看到這個的內心：「這個人懂我。」I人的實際回覆：「哈」。兩者是一致的。

en.content:
An extrovert's message looks like this:
"Hey are you there? How's your day? Did you eat? Oh wait have you seen that — actually let me tell you this first — how have you been lately?"

An introvert's message looks like this:
"lol"

The introvert's 'lol' translates to:
I saw your message, I'm here, I'm glad to hear from you, I don't know what to say, so I sent a 'lol'.
en.editorNote: Send to your introverted friend — they'll probably respond with 'lol' and you'll know they read it and felt deeply understood
variations: The introvert's internal reaction: 'this person gets me.' Their actual reply: 'lol.' Both statements are consistent.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac texting habits article — Aries sends rapid-fire messages, Taurus prefers in-person over texting

zh-tw.content:
牡羊座傳訊息的方式：
一口氣連發五則，每則都是一個不完整的句子，湊在一起才是一件事。

金牛座傳訊息的方式：
想了三十分鐘，打了一段很長的話，看了看，刪掉，最後傳：「改天約出來說」。

沒有誰對誰錯——只是一個表達快，一個覺得見面才算數。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你的牡羊或金牛座朋友，他們大概會說「這寫的就是我」
variations: 牡羊座：「為什麼不直接打電話？」金牛座：「為什麼不直接見面？」——兩個都不想慢慢打字的人，用的是完全不同的解法。

en.content:
How Aries texts:
Five messages in a row, each one an incomplete thought — together they form one sentence.

How Taurus texts:
Thinks for thirty minutes, types out a long message, reads it back, deletes it, then sends: 'Let's just talk in person.'

Neither is wrong — one just moves fast, and one thinks that face-to-face is the only thing that really counts.
en.editorNote: Send to your Aries or Taurus friend — they'll probably say 'this is literally me'
variations: Aries: 'Why not just call?' Taurus: 'Why not just meet up?' Two people who hate slow texting — and two completely different solutions.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio ambivert — can be charismatic but also the first out the door when a crowd gets overwhelming

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座的社交模式是個謎：

有時候他們是全場最吸引人注意的那個，眼神有力、話說得剛好、每句話都讓你想繼續聽。

有時候派對才開始一個小時，他們已經在找出口了。

不是情緒不穩——他們只是有一個隱藏的電量表，充好電的時候發光，沒電了就消失。不解釋。
zh-tw.editorNote: 天蠍座看到這個很可能一言不發，然後過了一小時傳你一個「準」
variations: 天蠍座的社交哲學：我願意出現，但我決定什麼時候離開。這兩件事都是我的自由。

en.content:
Scorpio's social mode is a mystery:

Sometimes they're the most magnetic person in the room — eye contact sharp, words perfectly timed, every sentence leaving you wanting more.

Sometimes the party's barely an hour in and they're already scanning for the exit.

It's not mood swings — they just have a hidden energy meter. When it's full, they shine. When it runs out, they disappear. No explanation offered.
en.editorNote: A Scorpio will probably read this in silence, then send you 'accurate' an hour later
variations: Scorpio social philosophy: I'm willing to show up, but I decide when I leave. Both of those are mine to choose.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac humor — signs and their relationship with sleep and bedtime

zh-tw.content:
各星座的睡前儀式：

雙子座：「我只滑五分鐘手機。」（三小時後還在）
巨蟹座：躺下來開始回想今天所有說過的話，然後每一句都重新分析一遍。
處女座：把明天的待辦清單再看一次，確認沒有漏掉任何事，然後確認第二次。
射手座：本來打算早睡，突然想起有個新計畫，打開備忘錄，結果兩點了。

只有金牛座：躺下，三分鐘，睡著。人生贏家。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到群組裡，每個人都會找到自己的那一條，然後在半夜回覆說「哭了」
variations: 睡前最難的星座：巨蟹（一直想）、雙子（一直滑）、處女（一直確認）。最輕鬆的星座：金牛（沾枕就著）。

en.content:
Bedtime routines by zodiac:

Gemini: 'Just five minutes on my phone.' (Three hours later, still there.)
Cancer: Lies down, then mentally replays every conversation from the day and re-analyzes each one.
Virgo: Reviews tomorrow's to-do list one more time to make sure nothing was missed. Then reviews it a second time.
Sagittarius: Planned to sleep early, suddenly remembers a new idea, opens the notes app — it's 2 a.m.

Taurus: Lies down. Three minutes. Out cold. Undisputed winner.
en.editorNote: Send to the group chat — everyone will find their entry and reply at midnight with 'I'm crying'
variations: Hardest signs to fall asleep: Cancer (always thinking), Gemini (always scrolling), Virgo (always checking). Easiest: Taurus (head hits pillow, game over).

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and how they apologize — ranges from dramatic Leo to silent Capricorn

zh-tw.content:
各星座的道歉方式：

獅子座：說得很大聲，很真誠，帶點戲劇感，但確實是認真的。
天秤座：把對方的感受分析得比本人還清楚，道歉完還附上解釋和改善方案。
天蠍座：不說對不起，但會默默做一件讓你知道他在意的事。
魔羯座：沉默。然後照常出現，像什麼都沒發生過。這就是他們的道歉。

沒有誰不在乎——只是語言不一樣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在朋友說「他根本不在乎，連道歉都不說」的時候傳，幫他們重新解讀對方的行為
variations: 「他沒有說對不起。」不一定代表他不在意——也許他的道歉語言，你還沒學會讀。

en.content:
How each zodiac apologizes:

Leo: Says it loudly, sincerely, with a touch of drama — but they genuinely mean it.
Libra: Analyzes your feelings better than you could yourself, then delivers an apology complete with explanation and action plan.
Scorpio: Never says sorry out loud, but quietly does something that lets you know they care.
Capricorn: Goes silent. Then shows up the next day like nothing happened. That's their apology.

None of them don't care — they just speak different languages.
en.editorNote: Send when a friend says 'they obviously don't care, they didn't even apologize' — helps reframe what an apology can look like
variations: 'They never said sorry.' That doesn't always mean they don't care — maybe you just haven't learned to read their apology language yet.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and workplace behavior — how each approaches tasks, deadlines, and colleagues

zh-tw.content:
星座在職場的真實面貌：

牡羊座：最快開始，也最快說「這個方向要改」。
處女座：最後一個交，但交出來的東西沒有錯誤。
天秤座：開了三次會，還沒決定要從哪裡開始。
射手座：截止日前一天突然爆發，交出來的東西讓大家很驚訝。
水瓶座：方法跟別人都不一樣，解釋起來要花很長時間，但結果通常是對的。

每個人都有自己的節奏。問題是，這些節奏不一定對得上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給同事或職場朋友，一定有人說「這不就是某某某」，然後笑著看了彼此一眼
variations: 職場裡最難合作的組合：牡羊（先衝再說）配處女（先想清楚再動）。但如果磨合好了，通常是最強的搭檔。

en.content:
Zodiac signs at work, honestly:

Aries: First to start, also first to say 'wait, we need to change direction.'
Virgo: Last to submit, but there are zero errors in what they hand in.
Libra: Three meetings in and still hasn't decided where to begin.
Sagittarius: Nothing for days, then explodes the night before the deadline — and the result surprises everyone.
Aquarius: Does it completely differently from everyone else, takes a long time to explain why, but is usually right.

Everyone has their own rhythm. The problem is those rhythms don't always sync up.
en.editorNote: Send to coworkers or work friends — someone will immediately say 'that's literally [name]' and everyone will share a look
variations: Hardest work pairing: Aries (act first, think later) with Virgo (think it through before touching anything). But when they figure each other out, they're usually unstoppable.

items.sourceNote: How each zodiac sign expresses anger — Aries explodes fast and cools fast, Cancer goes quiet, Scorpio goes cold

zh-tw.content:
各星座生氣的方式：

牡羊座：大聲說出來，說完就沒事了。
巨蟹座：不說，但臉上一清二楚。問他也說「沒事」——但你就是知道有事。
天蠍座：不爆發、不解釋，只是比平時更安靜，然後你開始坐立不安。
射手座：說了一句很直接的話，然後假裝什麼都沒發生，但那句話你聽到了。
魔羯座：沉默。繼續做事。這才是最可怕的。

沒有哪種生氣方式是對的——只是每個人的語言不一樣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給朋友看，他們通常會馬上找到自己的那一條，然後說「被揭穿了」
variations: 最讓人猜不透的生氣：天蠍座。你不確定他在不在意，但他全都記著。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign gets angry:

Aries: Says it out loud, then it's done. Fast in, fast out.
Cancer: Says nothing, but their face gives it all away. Ask them and they'll say 'I'm fine' — but you already know they're not.
Scorpio: No explosion, no explanation. Just goes quieter than usual, and now you're the one feeling uneasy.
Sagittarius: Drops one very direct line, then acts like nothing happened — but you heard it.
Capricorn: Goes silent. Keeps working. This is actually the most unsettling option.

No anger style is wrong — they're just speaking different languages.
en.editorNote: Send to a group — everyone will find their entry immediately and say 'caught'
variations: Most unreadable anger: Scorpio. You can't tell if they care, but they've logged every detail.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac love languages — Virgo shows love through acts of service, Leo through grand gestures, Cancer through consistent presence

zh-tw.content:
每個星座說「我愛你」的方式都不一樣：

處女座不說——但他幫你查了最近的特賣、記得你過敏什麼、在你最累的時候把事情都先處理好了。
獅子座說，而且很大聲，還附帶行動。
金牛座不說，但他一直在，這就是他的「說」。
雙魚座用感受說——他不一定說對了什麼，但你就是感覺到了。

愛的語言不只有一種。有時候安靜的那種，反而最長久。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說「他從來不說愛我」的朋友，幫他看見另一種說法
variations: 有些星座用行動代替語言——不是不愛，是用另一種你可能還沒學會的方式在說。

en.content:
Every zodiac sign says 'I love you' differently:

Virgo doesn't say it — but they checked the sale for you, remembered your allergies, and handled everything before you had to ask.
Leo says it, loudly, and backs it up with action.
Taurus doesn't say it, but they're just always there. That is their version.
Pisces says it through feeling — they don't always get the words right, but somehow you feel it anyway.

There's more than one love language. Sometimes the quiet kind lasts the longest.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who says 'they never tell me they love me' — helps them see a different kind of expression
variations: Some signs replace words with actions — not because they don't love you, but because they're speaking a language you might not have learned to read yet.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs under extreme stress — when pushed past their limit, even the patient signs have a breaking point

zh-tw.content:
每個星座都有一條底線。

金牛座：你可以慢慢磨、慢慢煩，他都忍著。
但碰到那條線的那一天，他連解釋都懶得給你。

雙子座：通常笑著處理所有事。直到某天笑不出來了，連他自己都嚇到。

天秤座：為了維持和平讓了很多。但讓到最後，
忽然就消失了——不爭，不吵，只是不在了。

平靜通常不代表沒有感受——只是感受還沒說出來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合分享給那個一直說「我沒事」的朋友，讓他知道你看見他在撐著
variations: 最安靜的崩潰：不爆發、不解釋，只是哪天你發現他不一樣了——那才是真正的轉折點。

en.content:
Every zodiac sign has a limit.

Taurus: You can chip away slowly, push steadily — they'll absorb it all.
But the day you hit that line, they won't even bother with an explanation.

Gemini: Usually handles everything with a laugh.
Until one day the laugh doesn't come — and even they're a little surprised.

Libra: Gives a lot to keep the peace. Gives and gives.
Then one day, quietly disappears — no argument, no scene, just gone.

Calm doesn't mean nothing's happening. It usually means it hasn't been said yet.
en.editorNote: Share with the friend who keeps saying 'I'm fine' — lets them know you see them holding it together
variations: The quietest breakdown: no explosion, no explanation — just one day you notice they're different. That's when the real shift happened.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and commitment/planning in relationships — Sagittarius resists locking down plans, Cancer over-plans, Aquarius needs independence even when committed

zh-tw.content:
各星座對「約定」的態度：

巨蟹座：約了就算數，連細節都記得，你說的每一件事他都記在心裡。
射手座：「好啊，到時候說。」
（「到時候說」有時候是真的，有時候是未來版的他在處理。）
水瓶座：願意在一起，但需要知道自己還是自己——有你，也有他自己的空間。
牡羊座：計畫是衝動，衝動是計畫，兩者沒有太大差別。

每個人對「承諾」的定義不太一樣。
問題往往不是不在乎，而是語言翻譯出了問題。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給那個說伴侶「不認真」的朋友，幫他重新看看對方是否只是在用不同的方式承諾
variations: 射手座說的「到時候再說」，有時候是真的很期待——只是他的大腦還沒把「期待」轉換成「日曆事件」。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign treats a commitment:

Cancer: A plan is a promise. They remember every detail, every word you said in passing.
Sagittarius: 'Yeah, let's figure it out closer to the time.'
(Sometimes that means they'll show up. Sometimes it means future-them is handling it.)
Aquarius: Happy to be with you — but needs to know they're still themselves. You, and also their own space.
Aries: Plans are impulse, impulse is the plan. The two are pretty much the same thing.

Everyone's definition of 'commitment' is a little different.
The problem usually isn't that they don't care — it's a translation issue.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who thinks their partner 'isn't serious' — might help them see a different kind of commitment
variations: When a Sagittarius says 'let's sort it out later,' they might genuinely be looking forward to it — their brain just hasn't converted 'excited' into 'calendar event' yet.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and money habits — Capricorn saves obsessively, Sagittarius spends on experiences, Taurus splurges on comfort

zh-tw.content:
各星座的花錢邏輯：

金牛座：「這個貴，但品質好，買一次就好。」
（然後又買了第二個，因為看到更好的。）

射手座：「反正錢是賺來花的，這次的體驗值回來了。」
（下個月的事下個月再說。）

魔羯座：比較了三十個品牌、等了兩個月特賣、還用了折價券，
最後買到的時候感覺賺到了一輩子。

雙魚座：原本只是來逛逛，
結果被一個「感覺很對」的東西帶走了，
回家才意識到根本沒有在預算裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到群組看大家對號入座，有人說「我就是那個魔羯」，有人安靜不說話（也是答案）
variations: 星座理財法：金牛存錢是為了花在值得的地方；魔羯存錢是目標導向；射手存錢是為了下一趟旅費；雙魚存錢是為了「以後再說」——然後以後永遠沒來。

en.content:
Zodiac spending logic:

Taurus: 'It's expensive, but it's quality. I'll only need to buy it once.'
(Then buys a second one after finding an even better version.)

Sagittarius: 'Money is for spending — this experience was worth every cent.'
(Next month is next month's problem.)

Capricorn: Compared thirty brands, waited two months for a sale, used a coupon code,
and when it finally arrived, felt like they had conquered something.

Pisces: Just came to browse.
Left with something that 'felt right.'
Got home and realized it was never in the budget to begin with.
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat and watch everyone self-identify — some will loudly claim Capricorn, some will go quiet (also an answer)
variations: Zodiac financial strategy: Taurus saves to spend on what's worth it. Capricorn saves with a specific goal. Sagittarius saves for the next trip. Pisces saves for 'someday' — which somehow never comes.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and friendship loyalty — how each sign shows up for a friend in crisis versus a casual hangout

zh-tw.content:
各星座當你「真的需要他們」的時候：

巨蟹座：在你說完第一句話之前，已經在想要準備什麼給你了。
天蠍座：不問原因，直接說「我在」——然後記下讓你難過的人是誰。
處女座：幫你把整件事情分析清楚，再給你一份行動建議。
射手座：帶你出門，因為他覺得換個環境比說什麼都有用。
天秤座：很想幫，但先幫你站在對方的角度想一遍，結果有點說不出口。

每種方式都是真心的——只是表達的語言不一樣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你那個在你最低潮時出現的朋友，讓他知道你記得，也懂他的方式
variations: 真正的朋友不是時時刻刻都在線的那個——是你說「我現在很不好」，他立刻出現的那個。

en.content:
Zodiac signs when you actually need them:

Cancer: Already thinking about what to bring you before you've finished your first sentence.
Scorpio: Doesn't ask why. Just says 'I'm here' — and quietly files away the name of whoever upset you.
Virgo: Walks you through the whole situation clearly, then hands you an action plan.
Sagittarius: Drags you outside, because they believe a change of scenery beats any pep talk.
Libra: Wants to help but also can't stop seeing it from the other side, so the words get stuck.

Every approach is genuine — they're just speaking different languages.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who showed up during your worst moment — lets them know you noticed and appreciated how they did it
variations: A real friend isn't the one who's always around — it's the one who shows up the moment you say 'I'm not okay.'

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and how they recharge after a draining day — introverts vs extroverts, fire vs water energy

zh-tw.content:
各星座「累了一天」的充電方式：

I人星座（巨蟹、處女、天蠍、水瓶）：
回到家，關燈，不說話，手機靜音，
整個人縮進自己的空間裡，
外面的世界暫停。這才叫做休息。

E人星座（牡羊、獅子、射手、雙子）：
累了反而想找人說話，
打個電話、約出去吃個東西——
跟人在一起，才是真正充到電。

沒有誰的方式比較對。
問題只在於你以為對方充電的方式和你一樣。
zh-tw.editorNote: I人傳給E人朋友，E人傳給I人朋友，讓彼此終於理解為什麼「累了要一個人待著」和「累了要找人聊」同樣合理
variations: I人的充電：一個人，安靜，不需要解釋。E人的充電：有人陪，熱鬧一點，然後好多了。兩種電池，兩種充法。

en.content:
How each zodiac type recharges after a draining day:

Introverted signs (Cancer, Virgo, Scorpio, Aquarius):
Get home, dim the lights, say nothing, mute the phone.
Curl back into their own space.
The world outside can wait. That's what rest actually looks like.

Extroverted signs (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius, Gemini):
Feeling drained makes them want to call someone.
Grab food, meet up, be around people —
being with others is what actually fills the tank.

Neither way is wrong.
The only problem is assuming your method is the same as theirs.
en.editorNote: Introverts send to extrovert friends, extroverts send to introvert friends — finally explains why 'I need alone time' and 'I need company' are both completely valid
variations: Introvert recharge: alone, quiet, no explanation needed. Extrovert recharge: company, a little noise, then good as new. Two battery types. Two charging methods.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and overthinking/second-guessing — Gemini and Libra overanalyze decisions, Virgo rewrites the same message five times

zh-tw.content:
三個星座傳訊息前的內心戲：

雙子座：
打了，刪了，重打，又刪了，
換了一個完全不同的角度，
傳出去，立刻後悔，
想到可以說得更好的版本——
但已經傳了。

天秤座：
草稿寫了三版，分析每一版的語氣，
請朋友幫忙看哪個比較好，
朋友說「都可以」，
又陷入選擇困難。

處女座：
把標點符號改了兩次，
確認沒有錯字，
確認語氣沒有太強，
確認對方不會誤解，
傳出去，然後繼續擔心對方誤解了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你身邊那個傳訊息前要想很久、或傳完還會說「我這樣說有沒有怪」的朋友
variations: 有些星座傳一條訊息要花的時間，比對方讀那條訊息多十倍——這不叫想太多，叫做太在乎說的對不對。

en.content:
Three signs and their internal process before hitting send:

Gemini:
Typed it, deleted it, rewrote it, deleted it again.
Tried a completely different angle.
Sent it. Immediately regretted it.
Thought of a better version —
but it's already out there.

Libra:
Drafted three versions, analyzed the tone of each,
asked a friend which one reads better.
Friend said 'either works.'
Now stuck again.

Virgo:
Adjusted the punctuation twice.
Checked for typos.
Made sure the tone wasn't too strong.
Made sure it couldn't be misread.
Sent it. Then kept worrying it was misread anyway.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who takes forever to text back or always follows up with 'was that weird to say?'
variations: Some signs spend ten times longer composing a message than it takes to read it — that's not overthinking, that's caring a lot about getting it right.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and food/ordering habits — Virgo reads ingredients, Sagittarius orders the unknown, Aries inhales the meal

zh-tw.content:
各星座在餐廳點餐的樣子：

牡羊座：掃一眼菜單，十秒決定，催大家快點。
金牛座：認真研究每道菜，最後點了上次來吃過的那個——因為知道好吃。
處女座：問服務生食材、問有沒有特殊醬料、確認過敏原，然後才點。
射手座：看到沒吃過的東西直接點，理由是「沒試過怎麼知道不好吃」。
天秤座：讓大家先點，自己等到最後，確認別人的選擇之後才決定——然後後悔沒點別的。
水瓶座：問有沒有菜單上沒列出來的東西。

點個餐而已，每個人都認真對待。
zh-tw.editorNote: 一桌朋友看到這個，通常當場就能對號入座，然後全部笑出來
variations: 最難一起出去吃飯的組合：牡羊（快決定）配天秤（等我再想想）——一個已經叫了服務生，一個菜單還沒翻完。

en.content:
Zodiac signs at a restaurant:

Aries: Scans the menu in ten seconds, decides, immediately wonders why everyone else is still reading.
Taurus: Studies each dish carefully, then orders the same thing they had last time — because they know it's good.
Virgo: Asks about ingredients, checks for allergens, confirms the sauce, and only then orders.
Sagittarius: Spots something they've never tried and orders it immediately. Reason: 'How will I know if I don't try?'
Libra: Lets everyone else order first, waits until the very last moment, then picks — and quietly wonders if they should have gone with something else.
Aquarius: Asks if there's anything that's not on the menu.

It's just ordering food. Somehow everyone treats it like a life decision.
en.editorNote: Read this at a table full of friends and watch everyone point fingers at each other
variations: Hardest restaurant combo: Aries (decided in ten seconds) with Libra (still thinking) — one has already called the waiter over, the other hasn't opened the menu yet.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and overthinking at night — Cancer replays conversations, Virgo mentally reviews unfinished tasks, Scorpio goes deep on a single thought

zh-tw.content:
各星座躺下來之後，腦子在做什麼：

巨蟹座：把今天所有對話重播一遍，確認自己哪句話說錯了。

處女座：突然想起一件還沒做完的事，在黑暗裡重新排了明天的待辦清單。

天蠍座：從一件小事出發，越想越深，最後抵達了一個沒人邀請就不該去的地方。

雙子座：想了七件不相關的事，每件都很精彩，早上全部忘光。

牡羊座：根本沒在想，已經睡著了。
（這才是今晚最讓人羨慕的星座。）
zh-tw.editorNote: 深夜刷手機看到這個的I人星座大概只會說「準」，然後繼續睡不著
variations: 睡前最危險的念頭不是「明天要早起」，是「等等，那件事我當時說的到底對不對？」——巨蟹座和處女座最懂。

en.content:
What each zodiac sign's brain is doing after the lights go out:

Cancer: Replaying every conversation from today, scanning for anything they might have said wrong.

Virgo: Suddenly remembers something unfinished, mentally rebuilds tomorrow's to-do list in the dark.

Scorpio: Starts from one small thing, goes deeper and deeper, and ends up somewhere no one invited them to go.

Gemini: Thinks about seven unrelated things, all of them fascinating. Forgets everything by morning.

Aries: Not thinking about anything. Already asleep.
(Most enviable sign of the night, by a wide margin.)
en.editorNote: Introverts scrolling at midnight will just respond 'accurate' and keep not sleeping
variations: The most dangerous bedtime thought isn't 'I need to wake up early' — it's 'wait, was what I said earlier actually okay?' Cancer and Virgo know exactly what this means.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and group chat behavior — who never reads, who sends voice notes, who screenshots and saves everything

zh-tw.content:
各星座在群組裡的角色：

雙子座：話最多的那個，永遠有新話題，讓群組不死。
獅子座：傳梗圖，等大家反應，沒反應就再傳一個。
處女座：已讀，不回，但把重要訊息截圖存起來了。
水瓶座：三週沒出現，突然冒出來說一件完全不相關的事，然後又消失。
巨蟹座：認真記得每個人說過的事，私下關心大家，從不在群組裡說。
天秤座：全部表情符號回應，讓每個人都覺得被認同，但沒有明確站邊。
魔羯座：加入群組是為了實際的事，事情解決了就靜音。

一個群組裡，每種人都需要。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳進群組，然後看大家搶著說「我就是那個XXX」，然後互相指認
variations: 群組裡最重要的人不是最愛說話的，是那個沉默但永遠記得所有事的——通常是巨蟹座或處女座。

en.content:
Zodiac signs in the group chat:

Gemini: The one with the most messages. Always has a new topic. Keeps the group from dying.
Leo: Posts memes, waits for reactions. No reaction — posts another one.
Virgo: Reads everything, replies to nothing, screenshots the important parts.
Aquarius: Absent for three weeks, suddenly sends something completely random, then vanishes again.
Cancer: Quietly remembers everything everyone said, checks in with people privately, never in the group itself.
Libra: Reacts to everything with an emoji — everyone feels seen, no one knows where they actually stand.
Capricorn: Joined for a practical reason. Problem solved. Muted.

A group chat needs all of these people.
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat, then watch everyone race to claim their type and point fingers at each other
variations: The most important person in the group chat isn't the loudest one — it's the quiet one who remembers everything. Usually Cancer or Virgo.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs when they have a crush — Scorpio investigates silently, Aries acts immediately, Pisces daydreams

zh-tw.content:
各星座喜歡上一個人的反應：

牡羊座：發現自己喜歡，下一秒就去做了什麼——不一定是告白，但一定有行動。

天蠍座：調查對象的社群媒體到三年前，然後假裝第一次認識他。

雙魚座：在腦子裡把兩個人的故事想了七遍，對方還不知道名字。

處女座：列出了對方所有優缺點，分析兩人的相處模式，得出結論「也許可行」，然後繼續觀察一個月。

射手座：喜歡就說，說完繼續過自己的生活，結果如何都是命。

金牛座：默默喜歡了很久，覺得時機到了才說——但「時機」這件事，他可能考慮了半年。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在暗戀的朋友，讓他對號入座，順便讓他知道每個星座都有自己的喜歡方式
variations: 最難猜的暗戀：天蠍座（表面零反應，心裡風浪大）。最顯而易見的暗戀：牡羊座（全世界都知道了只有對方不知道）。

en.content:
Zodiac signs when they develop a crush:

Aries: Realizes they like someone and does something about it within the next few minutes — not necessarily a confession, but definitely an action.

Scorpio: Deep-dives through the person's social media back to three years ago, then acts like they're meeting for the first time.

Pisces: Has played out their entire love story in their head seven different ways before the other person even knows their name.

Virgo: Lists out every pro and con, analyzes potential compatibility, concludes 'this might work,' then decides to observe for another month.

Sagittarius: Likes someone, says so, keeps living their life either way. Whatever happens, happens.

Taurus: Quietly likes someone for a long time, waits for the right moment to say anything — but 'the right moment' may take about six months to identify.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend with a crush — let them find themselves, and realize every sign has its own way of liking someone
variations: Hardest crush to detect: Scorpio (zero reaction on the outside, full storm inside). Most obvious crush: Aries (the whole world already knows except the person they like).

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and procrastination — Aries starts strong and stalls, Libra researches instead of starting, Pisces drifts into a completely different activity

zh-tw.content:
各星座的拖延症發作方式：

牡羊座：衝很快，衝到一半興趣沒了，去做別的事，等靈感回來再繼續。
（靈感有時候回來，有時候不回來。）

天秤座：先查了三個小時相關資料，告訴自己這是「準備」，結果正事還沒開始。

雙魚座：打開筆電，聽到一首歌，然後在腦子裡跟著想了半小時，回過神來才發現跑掉了。

魔羯座：沒有拖延症。有的是另一個問題：做完之後繼續做下一件，停不下來。

獅子座：需要「對的狀態」才能開始。那個狀態有時候很快來，有時候要等到截止日前三小時。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說「我等一下就做」然後兩小時後還沒動的朋友，讓他知道這是星座問題
variations: 最高效的拖延：射手座——截止日前一個晚上全部做完，還做得不錯。最無感的拖延：魔羯座——他不拖延，但他也不知道什麼叫休息。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign procrastinates:

Aries: Starts strong, loses interest halfway through, switches to something else, and plans to come back when the energy returns.
(Sometimes it returns. Sometimes it doesn't.)

Libra: Spends three hours researching the topic first, calls it 'preparation,' and hasn't actually started yet.

Pisces: Opens the laptop, hears a song, mentally drifts for thirty minutes, and genuinely forgets what they were supposed to be doing.

Capricorn: No procrastination. Different problem: finishes the task, then immediately starts the next one. Cannot stop.

Leo: Needs to be 'in the right headspace' before they can begin. That headspace sometimes arrives quickly. Sometimes it shows up three hours before the deadline.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who said 'I'll do it in a bit' two hours ago and still hasn't moved — let them know it's a zodiac thing
variations: Most effective procrastinator: Sagittarius — gets it all done the night before and does a decent job. Most unaware procrastinator: Capricorn — doesn't procrastinate, but also doesn't know what rest feels like.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac travel styles — how each sign plans and experiences vacation, from over-planned itineraries to total spontaneity

zh-tw.content:
各星座去旅遊的方式：

處女座：出發前兩個月就開始查，行程規劃到每個小時，備案有三個。
到了現場，如果有一個環節出錯，內心會崩潰——但表面繼續正常運作。

射手座：訂機票是衝動，行李是前一天晚上隨便塞的，
到了陌生地方反而最自在，跟當地人聊了三個小時。

金牛座：做了功課，找了評分最高的餐廳，
每一頓都認真吃，每一晚都睡好，
回來覺得這趟值了。

水瓶座：不跟團，不走熱門景點，
找了一個幾乎沒人去的地方，
回來說「還好你們沒來，人太多了」。

（不是真的沒人，但跟人一起的話就不是這種感覺了。）
zh-tw.editorNote: 旅遊前傳給同行的朋友，大家可以先對齊一下彼此的旅遊個性，避免到了現場才發現根本不同頻
variations: 和處女座旅遊：行程很紮實，不會踩雷。和射手座旅遊：不知道下一站是哪裡，但一定很精彩。選哪種，取決於你是想放鬆還是想冒險。

en.content:
Zodiac signs on vacation:

Virgo: Started researching two months out. Itinerary is scheduled to the hour. There are three backup plans.
If anything goes off script on-site, they're quietly falling apart — but keeping it together on the outside.

Sagittarius: Bought the flight on impulse. Packed the night before, mostly at random.
Arrives in an unfamiliar place and feels completely at home, ends up talking to a local for three hours.

Taurus: Did their homework. Found the highest-rated restaurants. Ate every meal seriously, slept well every night.
Came back feeling like the trip was genuinely worth it.

Aquarius: No tour groups, no tourist traps — found a place barely anyone knows about.
Comes back saying 'good thing you didn't come, it would've been too crowded.'

(It wasn't that crowded. But it wouldn't feel the same with other people.)
en.editorNote: Send to travel companions before a trip — helps everyone surface their vacation personalities before the clashes happen in person
variations: Traveling with a Virgo: tight itinerary, zero bad surprises. Traveling with a Sagittarius: no idea what's next, but it'll be a story. Which one you want depends on whether you're there to relax or to discover.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and gift giving — how each sign selects, wraps, and presents gifts reveals a lot about their personality

zh-tw.content:
各星座怎麼送禮這件事，藏著他們對你的心意：

巨蟹座：三個月前就開始想，記得你隨口說過的那句話，然後找到了那個東西。

獅子座：包裝比禮物本人更有存在感，打開的過程就是表演的一部分。

水瓶座：不送你「正常的禮物」——送你一個你沒有想到但後來很喜歡的東西。
（他研究過你，只是不說。）

牡羊座：靈感來的時候買了，靈感來的時候不一定是你生日——但他真的是想到才買的，不是敷衍。

天秤座：糾結了很久，最後選了一個「大家應該都不會反對的」，
然後回家想說是不是應該選另一個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 收到朋友禮物的時候想想他是哪個星座——也許那個禮物背後有你沒注意到的用心
variations: 送禮最讓人感動的不是多貴，是那個「他記得我說過這個」的瞬間——巨蟹座最擅長製造這種感覺。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign gives gifts says a lot about how they feel about you:

Cancer: Started thinking about it three months ago. Remembered the thing you mentioned in passing once, and tracked it down.

Leo: The wrapping is more of a presence than the gift itself. Opening it is part of the performance.

Aquarius: Doesn't give you a 'normal gift' — gives you something you never would have thought of but end up loving.
(They did their research. They just won't say so.)

Aries: Bought it the moment inspiration hit, which may or may not have been your birthday. But they genuinely thought of you — it wasn't obligatory.

Libra: Deliberated for a long time, then settled on something 'that nobody could really dislike.'
Went home and wondered if they should have picked the other one.
en.editorNote: Next time a friend gives you a gift, think about their sign — there might be more thought behind it than you realized
variations: The most moving gift isn't the most expensive one — it's the 'they remembered I said that' moment. Cancer is the sign most likely to give you that feeling.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs receiving compliments — some deflect, some absorb, some immediately return the compliment, some overthink it for days

zh-tw.content:
各星座被誇的時候：

獅子座：「謝謝，我知道。」
（這不是驕傲——這是他一直覺得的，你只是說出來了。）

處女座：「沒有啦，其實那裡還可以更好……」
（然後在心裡把被誇的地方分析了三遍。）

巨蟹座：臉紅，不說話，三天後還記得，在日記裡寫了下來。

水瓶座：「謝」——然後若無其事地繼續做自己的事。
（但他們其實很在乎，只是不想讓你知道。）

射手座：馬上回誇你，然後把這件事告訴下一個遇到的朋友。

天蠍座：點頭接受，眼神沒有變，但把你記住了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給朋友，讓他找到自己被誇的時候是哪種反應，通常I人會說「這不就是我」然後沒有下文
variations: 被誇最舒服的星座：獅子座（早就知道了，謝謝確認）。被誇最不知道怎麼反應的：處女座（謝謝但我有更多需要改進的地方……）。

en.content:
Zodiac signs when you give them a compliment:

Leo: 'Thank you, I know.'
(Not arrogance — this is what they've always thought. You just said it out loud.)

Virgo: 'Oh no, that part could actually be better...'
(Then quietly analyzes the exact thing you complimented for the next three rounds.)

Cancer: Goes pink. Says nothing. Still remembers it three days later and probably wrote it down.

Aquarius: 'Thanks.' Then continues exactly what they were doing.
(They actually cared a lot. They just don't want you to know that.)

Sagittarius: Immediately compliments you back, then tells the next friend they run into about this exchange.

Scorpio: Nods. Expression unchanged. Files you away as someone worth remembering.
en.editorNote: Share with friends and watch them locate their own reaction — introverts will say 'that's me' and then go quiet
variations: Most comfortable receiving a compliment: Leo (already knew, thanks for confirming). Least comfortable: Virgo ('thank you, but here's a list of what still needs work...').

items.sourceNote: Mercury retrograde reactions — a beloved astrology humor trope, each sign has a very different relationship with blaming the planets

zh-tw.content:
水星逆行期間，各星座的反應：

雙子座：「水星逆行？難怪我這週傳了三條後悔的訊息。」
（這週跟上週沒有差別，但現在有了解釋。）

處女座：已經在月曆上標好了逆行日期，事先排好了哪些重要事項要避開。
（他不相信，但萬一呢？）

牡羊座：「什麼逆行？繼續衝。」
（事後說什麼都是逆行害的。）

天秤座：查了到底逆行影不影響自己，查到一半跑去查另一個，最後不確定應該擔心哪個。

魔羯座：「不管什麼逆行，deadline還是在。」

雙魚座：這週感覺特別深刻，特別敏感，特別需要一個人待著——
不管水星在不在逆行，感覺都一樣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在水星逆行開始的那天傳出去，保證有人馬上說「對就是這樣」然後繼續把所有錯事怪給水星
variations: 水星逆行是一個很好用的概念：好事發生是你的努力，壞事發生是水星逆行。這個邏輯，每個星座都默默接受了。

en.content:
Zodiac signs during Mercury retrograde:

Gemini: 'Mercury retrograde? That explains why I sent three regrettable texts this week.'
(This week isn't different from last week. But now there's an explanation.)

Virgo: Already marked the retrograde dates on the calendar and pre-scheduled which important events to avoid.
(Doesn't believe in it. But what if?)

Aries: 'What retrograde? Keep going.'
(Retrograde gets the blame afterward.)

Libra: Looked up whether retrograde actually affects their sign, got sidetracked researching a different one, and isn't sure which one to worry about now.

Capricorn: 'Whatever is retrograding, the deadline is still there.'

Pisces: This week just feels more intense, more tender, more like they need to be alone —
honestly, that's every week. Retrograde or not.
en.editorNote: Post on the day Mercury retrograde starts — guaranteed someone will immediately say 'yep' and start blaming the planet for everything
variations: Mercury retrograde is a useful framework: good things that happen are your effort, bad things are Mercury's fault. Every sign has quietly accepted this logic.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs when plans get cancelled — introverts secretly relieved, extroverts genuinely disappointed, each sign's honest inner reaction

zh-tw.content:
朋友突然說「今天不能去了」的時候，各星座的內心：

I人星座（巨蟹、處女、天蠍、水瓶）：
「好喔。」
（內心：終於。已經在換睡衣了。）

E人星座（牡羊、獅子、射手、雙子）：
「啊？為什麼？可以改時間嗎？今天？晚一點？明天早上？」
（內心：這個空白要怎麼填。）

金牛座：
「好，那我就不出門了。」
然後做了一頓很好的晚餐，看了一部電影，
心裡覺得這樣也不錯——其實比原來的計畫還快樂。

天秤座：
說「沒關係」，但花了二十分鐘想說到底有沒有關係。

魔羯座：
立刻把那個空檔拿來做原本排在後面的事。
不浪費。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你的I人朋友，他可能會回你一個「哈」，然後你知道他其實鬆了一口氣
variations: I人的「好喔沒關係」和E人的「好喔沒關係」，語氣一模一樣，但心情是完全相反的宇宙。

en.content:
When a friend cancels plans, the honest inner reaction by sign:

Introverted signs (Cancer, Virgo, Scorpio, Aquarius):
'Oh, okay.'
(Inside: finally. Already changing into pajamas.)

Extroverted signs (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius, Gemini):
'Wait, why? Can we reschedule? Tonight? Later? Tomorrow morning?'
(Inside: what do I do with this gap now.)

Taurus:
'Alright, guess I'm staying in.'
Makes a good dinner, watches a movie,
realizes this turned out better than the original plan.

Libra:
Says 'totally fine,' then spends twenty minutes deciding whether it actually is.

Capricorn:
Immediately fills the slot with something that was already on the to-do list.
Nothing wasted.
en.editorNote: Send to your introverted friend — they'll reply with 'lol' and you'll know they're quietly relieved
variations: An introvert's 'oh no worries' and an extrovert's 'oh no worries' sound identical. They are from opposite ends of the emotional universe.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and money habits — fire signs spend impulsively, earth signs save strategically, water signs treat money as flow, air signs donate or invest in ideas

zh-tw.content:
各星座和錢的關係：

牡羊座：
看到喜歡的東西，買了再說。
「又不是買不起。」
（上個月說過一樣的話。）

金牛座：
也會買，但會先確認材質、評價、CP值，
確認值得，才出手——然後買了最好的那個。

魔羯座：
每筆支出都記得清清楚楚，
偶爾犒賞自己，但要確認它符合某個長期目標。

獅子座：
買的不只是東西——買的是體驗，買的是質感，
買完之後覺得自己值得，所以不後悔。

處女座：
比較了七個選項，選了最划算的，
然後回家繼續想說有沒有更划算的。

雙魚座：
錢來了用掉，用完了再說。
不是不在乎，是覺得錢是流動的——
留太久反而不自然。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給一起購物的朋友，幫大家解釋為什麼有人看到喜歡的東西會直接下手，有人要研究半小時才能結帳
variations: 最難一起逛街的組合：牡羊（看到就買）配處女（先比較再說）——一個已經在結帳，一個還在看評論。

en.content:
Zodiac signs and their relationship with money:

Aries:
Sees something they want, buys it.
'It's not like I can't afford it.'
(Said the same thing last month.)

Taurus:
Will also buy — but first checks the quality, reviews, and value-for-money.
Confirms it's worth it, then goes for the best version available.

Capricorn:
Tracks every expense with precision.
Treats themselves occasionally, but only when it aligns with a longer-term goal.

Leo:
Not just buying a thing — buying an experience, buying a feeling.
Feels they deserve it after the purchase, so no regrets.

Virgo:
Compared seven options, chose the most cost-effective one,
then went home and kept wondering if there was an even better deal somewhere.

Pisces:
Money comes in, money goes out.
Not careless — just believes money is meant to move.
Holding on too tight feels unnatural.
en.editorNote: Send to friends before a shopping trip — explains in advance why some people buy on sight while others need thirty minutes of research to check out
variations: Hardest combination to shop with: Aries (buys immediately) and Virgo (still reading reviews) — one is already at the register, the other hasn't decided yet.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and morning routines — some signs spring up with a plan, others hit snooze repeatedly, some need coffee before they're human

zh-tw.content:
各星座早上起床的樣子：

牡羊座：
鬧鐘響，睜眼，起床。
不需要過渡期，直接進入狀態。
（這對其他星座而言是超能力。）

金牛座：
按了兩次貪睡，翻了個身，
在心裡評估「再五分鐘」的可行性，
二十分鐘後才真正動起來。

雙子座：
一睜眼就開始看手機，
看完之後腦子已經在轉，
整個人清醒了，但也焦慮了。

處女座：
已經想好今天要做什麼了。
起床之前就想好了。
昨晚睡前其實也想過一遍。

天蠍座：
需要安靜，需要空間，需要在任何人說話之前先獨處十五分鐘。
別跟他說早安，等他先說。

射手座：
本來想早起去做一件什麼事——
不重要，因為昨晚睡得太晚了。
但明天一定會早起。
zh-tw.editorNote: 早上傳進群組，看誰第一個說「這就是我」——通常是金牛座先說，因為他剛剛才剛起床
variations: 一個家裡住了牡羊座和天蠍座：牡羊六點起來開燈，天蠍需要安靜到八點。這段時間誰都別說話。

en.content:
Zodiac signs and how they wake up:

Aries:
Alarm goes off. Eyes open. Up.
No transition needed — instantly operational.
(To every other sign, this is a superpower.)

Taurus:
Hits snooze twice, rolls over,
calculates whether 'five more minutes' is realistic,
finally gets moving about twenty minutes later.

Gemini:
Checks the phone the moment their eyes open.
Brain is already spinning by the time they put it down.
Fully awake — but also a little anxious now.

Virgo:
Already knows what today's plan looks like.
Knew before getting up.
Actually ran through it the night before too.

Scorpio:
Needs quiet, needs space, needs at least fifteen minutes alone before anyone speaks to them.
Don't say good morning first. Wait for them to go first.

Sagittarius:
Had a plan to wake up early and do something —
doesn't matter now, because last night ran late.
But tomorrow, definitely getting up early.
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat in the morning — whoever responds first with 'this is me' is probably Taurus, because they just woke up
variations: A household with an Aries and a Scorpio: Aries turns the lights on at 6am, Scorpio needs silence until 8. Nobody talks during that window.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and how they apologize — some say sorry quickly without meaning it, some never say it but show it through action, some take too long to admit they were wrong

zh-tw.content:
各星座道歉的方式：

牡羊座：
如果錯了，會說，說完就過了。
不拖，不繞彎，但也不長篇大論。

金牛座：
不太說「對不起」，但會默默買你喜歡吃的東西放在那裡。
這是他版本的道歉。

雙子座：
解釋了很多，說了很多，
講到最後你也不確定誰先道歉、誰在道歉。

天蠍座：
如果是真的錯了，會說，而且只說一次。
如果不覺得自己錯，你可能等很久。

天秤座：
覺得氣氛不對就先道歉，
不管是不是自己的問題——只是不想讓空氣繼續這樣。

魔羯座：
分析了一下，確認確實是自己的問題，然後說。
沒有多餘的話，但說了就算數。

雙魚座：
說了道歉，然後把自己的傷難過再講一遍，
結果最後是你在安慰他。
zh-tw.editorNote: 吵架後傳給對方，讓彼此先笑一下，有時候比繼續冷戰更有用
variations: 道歉最直接的：牡羊（說完就算了）。道歉最難等到的：天蠍（如果他覺得自己沒錯，你可能要先想想誰才真的有錯）。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign apologizes:

Aries:
If they were wrong, they'll say so, and that's that.
No delay, no detour, no lengthy speech.

Taurus:
Won't really say 'sorry' — but will quietly leave your favorite snack somewhere you'll find it.
That's the apology.

Gemini:
Explains a lot, says a lot,
and by the end neither of you is quite sure who apologized to whom.

Scorpio:
If they genuinely did something wrong, they'll say it — once.
If they don't think they were wrong, you might be waiting a while.

Libra:
Feels the tension and apologizes first,
whether or not it was actually their fault — anything to clear the air.

Capricorn:
Thinks it over, confirms the fault was theirs, then says so.
No extras. But when they say it, it counts.

Pisces:
Apologizes — and then somehow ends up explaining how hurt they felt,
until you find yourself comforting them.
en.editorNote: Send after an argument — sometimes getting both people to laugh is more useful than another round of silence
variations: Fastest apology: Aries (said it, done). Hardest apology to get: Scorpio (if they don't think they were wrong, maybe ask yourself who actually was).

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs as coworkers — Virgo color-codes the shared doc, Capricorn already finished before the meeting, Gemini great at brainstorming then disappears during execution

zh-tw.content:
各星座當同事的樣子：

處女座：
共用文件裡有顏色分類、有備注、有版本紀錄。
沒有人叫他這樣做，他就是這樣做。

魔羯座：
會議還沒開，他已經把自己的那份做完了，
在等其他人跟上。
（不催你，但你感覺得到。）

雙子座：
腦力激盪階段最有用——
點子源源不絕，氣氛帶動得很好。
到了執行階段，你找不到他了。

獅子座：
報告他報得很好，會議他帶得很有場面，
但他需要有人認可。
你誇他一下，他下午工作效率翻倍。

水瓶座：
提出了一個沒有人想到的方向，
說完之後全場沉默三秒，
然後大家說「這個可以」。

巨蟹座：
記得每個人的生日，感覺得到誰今天狀態不好，
是辦公室裡讓人覺得被在乎的那個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 辦公室午餐傳一下，大家對號入座，記得說「這是在說誰你們知道的」
variations: 最理想的專案組合：水瓶座出方向，處女座整理細節，魔羯座執行，雙子座對外溝通。獅子座負責讓整個團隊覺得自己很厲害。

en.content:
Zodiac signs as coworkers:

Virgo:
The shared doc has color coding, inline comments, and a version history.
Nobody asked for this. They just did it.

Capricorn:
Done with their portion before the meeting even starts,
just waiting for everyone else to catch up.
(Not chasing you. But you can feel it.)

Gemini:
Absolutely invaluable during brainstorming —
ideas non-stop, energy contagious.
Once execution begins, no one can find them.

Leo:
Gives a great presentation, runs the meeting with presence,
but needs acknowledgment to keep going.
Compliment them once and their afternoon output doubles.

Aquarius:
Pitches an angle nobody considered.
Room goes quiet for three seconds.
Then everyone says 'actually, that works.'

Cancer:
Remembers every colleague's birthday, notices when someone's having a rough day,
and is the reason the office feels like a place where people actually care.
en.editorNote: Share during a team lunch — watch everyone immediately identify each other and go 'you know who this is'
variations: Ideal project team: Aquarius sets the direction, Virgo organizes the details, Capricorn executes, Gemini handles external communication. Leo makes the whole team feel like they're winning.

items.sourceNote: Taurus season humor — late April/May, comfort-seeking, food-loving, stubbornly peaceful energy; Taurus treating food as a spiritual experience

zh-tw.content:
歡迎來到金牛季（四月下旬到五月）。

這段時間宇宙的統一指示是：
好好吃一頓飯。

金牛座把吃飯這件事處理得無比認真——
不是因為他們貪吃，
而是因為他們真的懂得，
一頓好飯值得被尊重。

其他星座在金牛季應該學習的一件事：
放下手機，先把面前這道菜吃完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 金牛季開始時傳出去，或是傳給那個吃飯一定要先拍照的朋友，讓他想想金牛座會怎麼看他
variations: 金牛座對美食的態度，大概是十二星座裡最接近人生哲學的：好東西不用急，急了就不好吃了。

en.content:
Welcome to Taurus season (late April through May).

The universe's unified memo for this period:
Go eat something good.

Taurus takes meals more seriously than most people take their career goals —
not because they're greedy,
but because they genuinely understand
that a really good meal deserves respect.

One thing every other sign should borrow from Taurus season:
put the phone down and actually finish what's in front of you.
en.editorNote: Share at the start of Taurus season, or send to the friend who photographs every dish before eating — let them feel the Taurus judgment
variations: Taurus's relationship with food is the closest any sign gets to a life philosophy: good things shouldn't be rushed. Rush it and it stops being good.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and how they handle unread messages — some reply instantly, some let it sit for days, some read it but feel no urgency

zh-tw.content:
各星座對「未讀訊息」的態度：

牡羊座：
看到就回。不看就算了。沒有中間狀態。

雙子座：
開了，看了，想了一個很好的回覆，
然後去做別的事，
三天後才記得沒有按傳送。

天蠍座：
已讀。不回。
不是沒看到——是還在考慮要不要回應。

處女座：
看完了，覺得現在回有點奇怪，
等到想好怎麼回才說話。
（你可能等到明天早上。）

射手座：
邊走路邊回，語音轉文字，
對方收到的訊息有三個錯字跟一段不知道從哪來的話。

天秤座：
覺得不管怎麼回都可能被誤解，
所以多看了幾遍，改了三個字，
才終於按下傳送。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給朋友，讓他對號入座自己在群組裡的回覆風格，I人通常一句話說完，E人會補個貼圖
variations: 未讀訊息對I人來說是「稍後再說」，對E人來說是「快點快點快點」。

en.content:
Zodiac signs and unread messages:

Aries:
See it, reply. Don't see it, move on. No in-between.

Gemini:
Opened it. Read it. Thought of a great response.
Got distracted.
Remembers three days later they never actually hit send.

Scorpio:
Read. No reply.
Not missed — still deciding whether to respond.

Virgo:
Saw it, but replying right now feels off somehow.
Waiting until they've figured out exactly what to say.
(You might hear back in the morning.)

Sagittarius:
Replies while walking, voice-to-text on.
The message you receive has three typos and one sentence from somewhere else entirely.

Libra:
Worries any response could be misread.
Rereads the message several times, edits three words,
then finally sends.
en.editorNote: Share with friends and watch everyone immediately call out the group chat's most notorious slow-replier
variations: For introverts, an unread message means 'I'll deal with this later.' For extroverts, it means 'why haven't they answered yet.'

items.sourceNote: Taurus stubbornness / commitment to comfort — once settled into a routine or a couch, almost nothing can move them; humorous take on resistance to change

zh-tw.content:
金牛座在沙發上坐定之後，
就等於跟那個沙發簽了一份不成文的合約：
今晚哪裡也不去。

你可以邀他出門。
他會說「好啊，等一下。」
然後你等了四十分鐘，
他還在原位，加了一條毯子。

這不是懶——
這叫做清楚知道自己要什麼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你那個永遠說「好啊等一下」然後永遠沒有出現的金牛朋友，他大概會回你一個「哈」然後繼續躺著
variations: 金牛座不需要理由不出門，他只需要一個夠舒服的地方讓他沒有理由離開。

en.content:
Once a Taurus settles onto the couch,
they've signed an unspoken agreement with that couch:
nowhere else tonight.

You can still invite them out.
They'll say 'sure, in a bit.'
Forty minutes later,
same spot. Added a blanket.

This isn't laziness —
it's knowing exactly what you want.
en.editorNote: Send to your Taurus friend who always says 'yeah, in a sec' and then never shows — they'll reply with 'accurate' without moving
variations: A Taurus doesn't need a reason to stay home. They just need a comfortable enough spot that no reason to leave can compete.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and how they make decisions — some agonize, some act on pure instinct, some make a pro/con list and still can't decide

zh-tw.content:
各星座做決定的方式：

牡羊座：
感覺對了就做。
分析是浪費感覺的溫度。

天秤座：
列了正反兩邊，各五點，
還是不知道，又查了一篇文章，
最後問朋友，然後不管朋友說什麼都覺得哪裡怪。

魔羯座：
目標定好，往後推算，路徑清楚，
執行。
不需要「感覺」，只需要方向。

雙魚座：
感覺這個比較對，
也感覺那個比較對，
其實都有感覺，
只是不確定哪個感覺比較準。

水瓶座：
想清楚了，跟別人說，
大家覺得太奇怪，
水瓶座堅持，
三年後大家說「你當時就說對了」。

處女座：
已知的變數列出來了，未知的也預想過了，
做了決定——
然後繼續想有沒有漏掉什麼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考試選科、換工作、點餐的時候都可以傳，讓大家笑完之後對照一下自己到底是哪種人
variations: 十二星座做決定的最大公約數：牡羊座衝了再說，天秤座說了再衝，處女座衝了還在想有沒有更好的方向。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign makes a decision:

Aries:
If it feels right, do it.
Analysis just cools down the momentum.

Libra:
Made a pro/con list, five points each side,
still undecided, found another article,
asked a friend, then disagreed with everything the friend said.

Capricorn:
Set the goal, worked backward, mapped the route, executed.
No 'feelings' required — just a direction.

Pisces:
This one feels right.
But that one also feels right.
Both feel right, actually.
Just not sure which feeling to trust.

Aquarius:
Thought it through, told people, got told it was too weird,
held the position anyway.
Three years later: 'you called it.'

Virgo:
Listed every known variable, pre-considered the unknowns,
reached a decision —
then kept thinking in case something was missed.
en.editorNote: Share when picking courses, changing jobs, or ordering food — people will laugh and immediately recognize themselves
variations: The twelve signs distilled: Aries acts before deciding, Libra decides before acting and then reconsiders, Virgo acts and immediately wonders if there was a better option.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their relationship with sleep — night owls vs. early risers, overthinking at 2am, and who actually falls asleep the moment they lie down

zh-tw.content:
各星座凌晨兩點在做什麼：

金牛座：
已經睡了。一個小時前就睡了。
甚至在睡前喝了杯熱的。
人生如此就夠了。

雙子座：
手機滑到鎖屏，
鎖屏後又拿起來，
本來要睡的，但剛看到一篇很有趣的東西。

天蠍座：
沒睡，在想事情。
不是擔心，不是焦慮——
只是有一件事還沒想清楚，
想清楚了再說。

處女座：
明天的行程在腦子裡過了一遍，
又過了一遍，
發現有一個細節可能需要調整，
調整完了繼續過。

牡羊座：
睡了又醒，醒了滑手機，
看到有人在講什麼，
想回應一下，
然後又躺回去，
繼續睡。

雙魚座：
不確定自己是不是睡著了，
也不確定剛才想的算不算夢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個傳訊息給你說「你睡了嗎」的朋友，讓他對號入座他凌晨兩點在幹嘛
variations: 「睡前只看五分鐘手機」是十二星座共同的謊言，只有金牛座真的做到了，因為他根本不看手機就睡著了。

en.content:
What each zodiac sign is doing at 2am:

Taurus:
Already asleep. Has been for an hour.
Made a warm drink before bed.
This is enough. This is good.

Gemini:
Scrolled to the lock screen,
picked the phone back up,
was about to sleep but found something interesting.

Scorpio:
Awake, thinking.
Not anxious, not worried —
there's just one thing that isn't resolved yet.
Can't sleep until it is.

Virgo:
Running through tomorrow's schedule in their head.
Then again.
Spotted a detail that might need adjusting.
Adjusted it mentally. Ran through it again.

Aries:
Fell asleep, woke up, checked the phone,
saw someone saying something,
thought about replying,
laid back down,
fell asleep again.

Pisces:
Not sure if they've drifted off yet.
Also not sure if what they were just thinking counts as a dream.
en.editorNote: Send to whoever texts you 'you still up?' at 2am — watch them immediately find themselves in the list
variations: 'Just five minutes on my phone before bed' is a lie shared equally by all twelve signs. Only Taurus actually keeps the promise — because they were asleep before even reaching for it.

items.sourceNote: Taurus season vibes — late April energy, slowing down, choosing softness, the universe inviting everyone to act a little more like a Taurus

zh-tw.content:
金牛季的世界運作方式：

別人問你「你最近在忙什麼」——
你想了三秒，發現自己這週最大的成就是
買到剛好熟的酪梨。

這在金牛座眼中不是耍廢，
是活得有品味。

金牛季在告訴你：
你不一定要一直前進，
有時候坐下來把咖啡喝完，
也算是對人生的一種尊重。
zh-tw.editorNote: 金牛季傳給那個老是覺得自己「不夠努力」的朋友，讓他們今天先放過自己一次
variations: 金牛季的核心精神：把椅子坐熱，把咖啡喝完，把那餐慢慢吃完——這就是今天的主要任務了。
金牛季提醒你：休息不是停下來，是宇宙叫你充電。

en.content:
Taurus season operating principles:

Someone asks 'What have you been up to lately?' —
you pause, and realize your biggest accomplishment this week
was buying an avocado at peak ripeness.

In Taurus terms, this isn't slacking.
This is living with taste.

Taurus season is here to remind you:
you don't have to keep moving.
Finishing your coffee while it's still warm
counts as a meaningful contribution to your day.
en.editorNote: Send during Taurus season to the friend who keeps saying they're 'not doing enough' — give them permission to sit down today
variations: Taurus season's core principle: warm the chair, finish the coffee, eat the meal slowly — that's the assignment.
Taurus season reminder: rest isn't stopping. It's the universe telling you to recharge.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs reacting to spring cleaning / decluttering — some throw everything out, some keep everything 'just in case', some reorganize emotionally instead of physically

zh-tw.content:
各星座斷捨離的方式：

處女座：
清單列好，分類完成，
標籤貼上，箱子標好——
還沒開始丟，但流程已經完美。

巨蟹座：
拿起一件舊衣服，
想到三年前穿這件去過某個地方，
哭了一下，又把它放回去。

射手座：
全部丟掉。
後悔了再說。
反正之後再買也沒差。

天秤座：
這個要丟還是留呢？
問了三個朋友，
意見全部不一樣，
決定明天再想。

摩羯座：
看了一下時間成本，
發現整理一個下午能省下未來六個月找東西的時間，
安靜地開始執行。
zh-tw.editorNote: 春天大掃除的時候傳，看大家對號入座自己到底是哪一型
variations: 斷捨離的真相：天秤座問三個朋友、巨蟹座哭一下又放回去、處女座還在貼標籤、射手座已經全丟完在逛網拍。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign tackles decluttering:

Virgo:
List drafted, categories defined,
labels printed, boxes labeled —
nothing thrown out yet, but the workflow is flawless.

Cancer:
Picked up an old shirt,
remembered wearing it somewhere three years ago,
cried a little, put it back.

Sagittarius:
Threw everything out.
Will regret it later.
Will just buy it again — no big deal.

Libra:
Keep it or toss it?
Asked three friends.
Three different opinions.
Decided to think about it tomorrow.

Capricorn:
Calculated the time investment,
realized one afternoon of sorting saves six months of future searching,
quietly started executing.
en.editorNote: Send during spring cleaning season — watch everyone immediately spot themselves in the list
variations: Decluttering, honestly: Libra polls three friends, Cancer cries and puts it back, Virgo is still labeling, Sagittarius already threw everything out and is online shopping for replacements.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their relationship with food / meals — Taurus season focus on food as comfort, ritual, identity; how each sign approaches eating

zh-tw.content:
各星座吃飯的態度：

金牛座：
吃飯是一天最重要的事。
不能站著吃，不能匆忙吃，
不能配工作吃。
打擾我吃飯等於打擾我跟宇宙的連結。

雙子座：
吃到一半開始講話，
講到一半忘了在吃什麼，
抬頭發現飯涼了。

獅子座：
吃什麼不重要，
重要的是這頓飯要拍起來好看。

處女座：
看了一下成份表，
看了一下熱量，
看了一下廚房乾不乾淨——
好吧，吃了。

雙魚座：
本來只想吃一點，
結果不知不覺吃完整份，
還有點想再點一份甜點，
但會假裝自己有自制力。
zh-tw.editorNote: 金牛季適合，傳給那個跟你約吃飯永遠選最久那家餐廳的朋友
variations: 金牛座的人生哲學濃縮成一句話：「等等，先讓我把這口吃完。」

en.content:
How each zodiac sign approaches eating:

Taurus:
A meal is the most important event of the day.
Cannot eat standing up. Cannot eat in a rush.
Cannot eat while working.
Interrupting my meal interrupts my connection with the universe.

Gemini:
Started talking mid-meal,
forgot what they were eating,
looked down to find the food cold.

Leo:
The food itself isn't the point.
The point is whether it photographs well.

Virgo:
Checked the ingredients,
checked the calories,
checked whether the kitchen looked clean —
fine. Eating.

Pisces:
Only meant to have a little,
finished the whole plate without noticing,
tempted to order dessert too,
but will pretend to have self-control.
en.editorNote: Perfect for Taurus season — send to the friend who always picks the longest, slowest restaurant
variations: Taurus philosophy in one sentence: 'Hold on — let me finish this bite first.'

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and how they handle compliments — some deflect, some absorb, some return it awkwardly, some don't believe it; introvert vs extrovert response patterns

zh-tw.content:
各星座被稱讚的反應：

獅子座：
「對啊我知道，謝謝你發現了。」
（內心：終於有人說出來了。）

處女座：
「沒有啦，這個其實還可以再做得更好。」
（內心：列出三個可以改進的點。）

巨蟹座：
臉紅，低頭，小聲說謝謝，
回家還會反覆想對方是不是真心的。

天蠍座：
「嗯。」
（不是冷淡，只是不知道怎麼接。）

雙魚座：
「真的嗎？你也很棒欸！」
（馬上反射回去，因為被稱讚會害羞。）

水瓶座：
「噢，這個喔。其實我只是隨便做的。」
（真的是隨便做的，但做得還不錯。）
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個一被稱讚就想躲起來的I人朋友，讓他知道他不孤單
variations: 稱讚天秤座記得多稱讚兩次——他們會以為你是隨便講講，講三次以上才會開始相信。
處女座聽到稱讚的第一反應永遠是「你哪裡看錯了」，請耐心解釋。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign reacts to a compliment:

Leo:
'Yeah, I know. Thanks for noticing.'
(Internally: finally, someone said it.)

Virgo:
'It's nothing — honestly it could be better.'
(Internally: lists three things they'd improve.)

Cancer:
Blushes, looks down, mumbles a thank you,
goes home and replays it wondering if it was sincere.

Scorpio:
'Mm.'
(Not cold — just genuinely doesn't know what to say.)

Pisces:
'Really? You're amazing too!'
(Instant deflection — compliments make them shy.)

Aquarius:
'Oh, this? I just kind of threw it together.'
(They did just throw it together. It's still good.)
en.editorNote: Send to your introvert friend who panics and disappears the second they get complimented — let them know they're not alone
variations: When complimenting a Libra, say it twice — they'll assume you're being polite. After the third time, they'll start to believe you.
A Virgo's first reaction to any compliment is 'you must be looking at the wrong thing.' Be patient.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs in group chats — who lurks, who spams, who replies in essays, who reads everything but never types; classic introvert/extrovert split

zh-tw.content:
12星座在群組裡的角色：

牡羊座：
第一個丟話題，第三個就跳到下一個話題，
沒有人跟上也沒關係，他自己玩得很開心。

金牛座：
已讀，但只有提到吃飯的時候才會出現。
（一講到聚餐打開地圖比誰都快。）

雙子座：
同時在三個群組講同一件事，
每次講的版本都不一樣。

巨蟹座：
傳了一段很真心的話，
結果被洗版蓋掉，
默默難過一整天。

處女座：
糾正錯字、整理時間、做共筆，
沒人拜託他，他自己想做。

天蠍座：
從不發言但全部都看，
關鍵時刻丟一句話直接終結話題。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到群組裡，看誰先承認自己是哪一個
variations: 射手座的群組發言只有兩種：「哈哈哈哈哈」和「等等我去哪了」。
水瓶座發完一個冷門話題之後就消失，三天後回來問：「所以那個怎麼樣了？」

en.content:
The 12 zodiac signs in a group chat:

Aries:
First to drop a topic, third to jump to a new one,
nobody has to follow — they're entertaining themselves.

Taurus:
Read. Will only surface if food is mentioned.
(Mention dinner plans and watch them open Maps faster than anyone.)

Gemini:
Telling the same story in three different group chats,
each version slightly different.

Cancer:
Sent something heartfelt,
got buried by 40 unrelated messages,
quietly upset all day.

Virgo:
Fixing typos, organizing the schedule, building a shared doc —
nobody asked, but they wanted to.

Scorpio:
Never types, reads everything,
drops one sentence at the perfect moment and ends the conversation.
en.editorNote: Drop this in your group chat and see who confesses first
variations: A Sagittarius only has two types of group chat messages: 'hahahahaha' and 'wait where am I going.'
Aquarius drops a niche topic, vanishes for three days, then returns asking 'so how did that turn out?'

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs in arguments / conflict — fire signs explode, earth signs go silent, water signs cry, air signs over-explain; humorous take on conflict styles

zh-tw.content:
各星座吵架的方式：

牡羊座：
話講完了情緒也走完了，
十分鐘後問你：「我們剛剛在吵什麼？」

金牛座：
不吵，只是從現在開始不講話，
為期不定，可能三天，可能三個月。

雙子座：
用四種不同的角度幫你分析你錯在哪，
講到最後連自己都被說服。

獅子座：
聲音變大不是生氣，
是在強調自己的立場，
（其實還是生氣。）

天蠍座：
當下沒事，事後三個月還記得，
而且記得很清楚。

摩羯座：
冷靜分析事實、列出證據、
然後提出解決方案——
你會懷疑自己是不是在跟律師吵架。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貼在「我又不小心惹到他了」的時候，先看自己是哪一型
variations: 雙魚座吵架到一半會突然開始哭，吵架的人會不知道接下來要怎麼繼續。
天秤座永遠不會主動吵架，他們的策略是「拖到對方自己冷靜下來」。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign argues:

Aries:
Done yelling, done feeling things,
ten minutes later: 'Wait, what were we fighting about?'

Taurus:
Doesn't argue. Just stops talking to you.
Duration unknown — could be three days, could be three months.

Gemini:
Explains four different angles of why you're wrong,
by the end has accidentally convinced themselves of all four.

Leo:
Getting louder isn't anger,
it's emphasis on their position.
(It's still anger.)

Scorpio:
Fine in the moment.
Three months later, remembers everything — vividly.

Capricorn:
Calmly presents the facts, lists evidence,
proposes a solution.
You'll start to suspect you're arguing with a lawyer.
en.editorNote: Save this for the next 'I think I upset them again' moment — figure out which type you're dealing with
variations: A Pisces will start crying mid-argument, leaving the other person unsure how to continue.
A Libra will never start a fight. Their strategy is 'wait it out until the other person calms down.'

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs reacting to surprise plans — last-minute invitations, spontaneous trips, friends showing up unannounced; introvert panic vs extrovert delight

zh-tw.content:
朋友突然傳「現在出來嗎？」各星座的反應：

牡羊座：
「好，我已經在路上了。」
（其實還沒出門，但兩分鐘後真的會出現。）

金牛座：
看了訊息，看了自己身上的睡衣，
看了沙發，做了選擇——
「下次。」

雙子座：
「好啊好啊好啊！等等我先傳給其他人問要不要一起來。」
（半小時後變成八個人的聚會。）

處女座：
「現在？沒有預告？我需要時間心理準備。」
（其實只是還沒洗頭。）

摩羯座：
打開行事曆，看到今天還有兩件事要做，
回：「下週四晚上七點可以。」

雙魚座：
「好啊！」
（出門前在家裡迷路，找不到鑰匙，找到鑰匙又忘記要去哪。）
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在猶豫要不要赴約的時候傳給朋友，順便用星座當藉口
variations: 天蠍座面對臨時邀約只有一個原則：「事先沒講就是沒有。」
獅子座聽到臨時邀約會先問：「有誰會去？」這不是社交，是市場調查。

en.content:
When a friend texts 'wanna come out right now?' — by zodiac sign:

Aries:
'Yes, on my way.'
(Hasn't left the house yet, but will somehow arrive in two minutes.)

Taurus:
Looks at the text, looks at the pajamas, looks at the couch.
Makes a decision: 'Next time.'

Gemini:
'Yes yes yes! Hold on, let me ask a few more people if they want to come.'
Thirty minutes later it's a party of eight.

Virgo:
'Right now? With no warning? I need time to mentally prepare.'
(Translation: hair isn't washed.)

Capricorn:
Opens the calendar, sees two more tasks today,
replies: 'Next Thursday at 7pm works.'

Pisces:
'Sure!'
Then gets lost in their own apartment looking for keys,
finds the keys, forgets where they were going.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend you're bailing on — use the zodiac as your alibi
variations: Scorpio has one rule for last-minute invites: 'If you didn't tell me in advance, the answer is no.'
A Leo's first response to a spontaneous invite is 'who else is going?' That's not socializing — that's market research.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and lending / borrowing belongings — who returns things immediately, who keeps it for months, who 'forgets' on purpose; everyday relatable humor

zh-tw.content:
借東西給各星座之後的下場：

牡羊座：
當天用完，當天還，
甚至附帶一句「謝謝啦」就走了，超乾脆。

金牛座：
借的時候很慎重，還的時候更慎重，
還會檢查有沒有刮到、髒到、缺了什麼。

雙子座：
借走之後再也沒有出現過。
你問他還記得嗎？他說：「啊對欸我有借嗎？」

獅子座：
借走的時候講得很大聲，
還的時候安安靜靜放回原位，
當作沒發生過。

處女座：
還的時候比借走時還乾淨，
甚至幫你把另一個髒的順便清了。

射手座：
你以為他會還，他真心也以為自己會還，
但東西已經跟他去了三個城市。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個借走你充電線到現在還沒還的朋友，看他笑得出來嗎
variations: 天蠍座借東西的時候會記住所有細節，包括你借他的時候表情有沒有不情願。
雙魚座還東西的時候永遠多附一張小紙條：「謝謝你！愛你！」（紙條比東西還重要。）

en.content:
What happens after you lend something to each zodiac sign:

Aries:
Uses it that day, returns it that day,
tosses out a quick 'thanks!' and walks away. Clean transaction.

Taurus:
Takes it carefully, returns it even more carefully,
inspects for scratches, stains, and missing pieces — on your behalf.

Gemini:
Borrows it, vanishes.
Ask them about it: 'Wait, did I borrow that?'

Leo:
Borrows it loudly,
returns it silently,
acts like the whole thing never happened.

Virgo:
Returns it cleaner than when you lent it,
also cleans the other thing they noticed was dirty.

Sagittarius:
They think they'll return it. You think they'll return it.
The item has now been to three cities with them.
en.editorNote: Send this to the friend who borrowed your charger six months ago — see if they laugh
variations: A Scorpio remembers every detail of borrowing — including whether your face looked reluctant when you said yes.
A Pisces always includes a little note when returning something: 'Thank you! Love you!' The note matters more than the item.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their texting reply speed — instant repliers vs three-day ghosters; relatable digital communication humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座回訊息的速度排行：

雙子座：
秒回。回得比你打字還快。
而且通常一次回三則，每則都是不同話題。

獅子座：
看到訊息會先思考——
「這則訊息值不值得我現在回？」
值得就秒回，不值得就放著當作沒看到。

處女座：
打字、刪除、再打、再刪。
半小時後送出三個字：「好喔。」

天蠍座：
已讀不回是常態。
他不是不在乎，他在思考。
（思考時間：三天到三個月不等。）

水瓶座：
看到訊息→決定等等回→忘記→兩週後突然回
「啊抱歉我以為我回過了。」

雙魚座：
回得很慢，但每則都長到像情書。
你只是問他要不要吃飯。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是已讀不回的朋友，看他這次會不會破例馬上回
variations: 金牛座的回訊息原則：「重要的事再回，不重要的等想到再說。」（什麼是重要？只有他知道。）
牡羊座回訊息只有兩種狀態：秒回，或者根本沒看到。中間沒有灰色地帶。

en.content:
Zodiac signs ranked by texting reply speed:

Gemini:
Replies instantly. Faster than you can type.
Usually sends three messages back-to-back, each on a different topic.

Leo:
Sees the message and thinks:
'Is this worth my immediate attention?'
If yes, instant reply. If no, it stays unread forever.

Virgo:
Types. Deletes. Types again. Deletes again.
Thirty minutes later sends: 'Sounds good.'

Scorpio:
Leaves you on read by default.
They're not ignoring you — they're processing.
(Processing time: three days to three months.)

Aquarius:
Sees the message → plans to reply later → forgets → replies two weeks later:
'Sorry, I thought I already responded.'

Pisces:
Replies slowly, but every message is essay-length.
You just asked if they wanted dinner.
en.editorNote: Send this to the friend who always leaves you on read — see if they break the pattern this time
variations: A Taurus's texting rule: 'Reply to important things. Everything else can wait until I feel like it.' (What counts as important? Only they know.)
An Aries has two texting modes: instant reply, or never saw it. There is no in-between.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs at a party — who arrives first, who hides in the kitchen, who leaves at 9pm; introvert vs extrovert party dynamics

zh-tw.content:
各星座在派對裡的位置：

獅子座：
站在中間，正在說一個自己的故事。
聽眾五個人，他覺得是五百個。

雙子座：
已經跟全場每個人都聊過一輪，
現在開始第二輪。

射手座：
不知道從哪裡冒出來的，
手上拿著不知道誰給的酒，
正在跟陌生人聊到笑岔氣。

金牛座：
坐在沙發上，旁邊是食物。
從到場到結束都沒換過位置。

處女座：
在廚房幫主人收拾，
說自己只是順手，其實是社交避難所。

摩羯座：
九點準時到，九點半開始看手錶，
十點留下一句「我明天還要早起」消失。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下次參加派對之前傳給朋友，順便讓他猜你會是哪一種
variations: 巨蟹座在派對裡只跟自己認識的人講話，不認識的人經過時微笑點頭，剛剛好的禮貌。
天蠍座在派對裡選一個角落坐下，觀察整場一小時後，已經默默掌握了所有人的人際關係。

en.content:
Where each zodiac sign is at a party:

Leo:
Center of the room, telling a story about themselves.
Five people are listening. They think it's five hundred.

Gemini:
Already talked to everyone in the room.
Now on round two.

Sagittarius:
Appeared out of nowhere,
holding a drink someone handed them,
dying laughing with a complete stranger.

Taurus:
On the couch, next to the snacks.
Hasn't moved since they arrived.

Virgo:
In the kitchen, helping the host clean up.
Says they're 'just being helpful' — really, it's a social bunker.

Capricorn:
Arrives at 9 sharp, starts checking the time at 9:30,
leaves at 10 with 'I have an early morning' and vanishes.
en.editorNote: Send to your friends before the next party — let them guess which one you'll be
variations: Cancer at a party only talks to people they already know. Strangers get a polite smile and nod — exactly enough courtesy, nothing more.
Scorpio finds a corner, sits down, observes for an hour, and silently figures out the entire social hierarchy of the room.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their morning routines — early risers, snooze-button warriors, chaotic mornings; relatable everyday humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座的早晨真實版：

摩羯座：
鬧鐘還沒響就醒了。
已經回完三封信、運動完、喝完咖啡，
而你還在按貪睡。

牡羊座：
鬧鐘響了立刻跳起來，
衝進浴室，忘記要做什麼，
再衝出來看一次行事曆。

金牛座：
鬧鐘響了五次，
按掉第六次後決定請假。
人生需要平衡，今天選擇平衡睡眠。

雙魚座：
鬧鐘響的時候在做夢，
以為夢裡的鈴聲是劇情的一部分，
等真的醒來已經遲到四十分鐘。

天蠍座：
醒了，但不想動。
睜著眼睛躺在床上盯著天花板二十分鐘，
思考人生意義之後才下床。

水瓶座：
忘記昨天有沒有設鬧鐘，
忘記今天星期幾，
忘記自己有沒有約。
（最後發現都沒有，鬆了一口氣繼續睡。）
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個永遠遲到的朋友，搭配「你是哪一個」的問句
variations: 處女座的早晨從前一晚就開始準備：衣服掛好、咖啡機定時、明天的行程表打開——這樣早上才能優雅地慌亂。
獅子座的早晨第一件事是照鏡子，第二件事是發限時動態，第三件事才想到要刷牙。

en.content:
What each zodiac sign's morning actually looks like:

Capricorn:
Awake before the alarm.
Already answered three emails, worked out, finished coffee —
while you're still hitting snooze.

Aries:
Alarm goes off, jumps out of bed instantly,
runs to the bathroom, forgets why they got up,
runs back to check the calendar.

Taurus:
Alarm goes off five times.
After the sixth snooze, decides to call in sick.
Life needs balance — today, balance means sleep.

Pisces:
Was dreaming when the alarm went off,
thought the ringing was part of the dream's plot,
actually wakes up forty minutes late.

Scorpio:
Awake, but refuses to move.
Stares at the ceiling for twenty minutes,
contemplates the meaning of life, then gets up.

Aquarius:
Forgot if they set an alarm last night,
forgot what day it is,
forgot if they have plans.
(Realizes they don't, sighs with relief, goes back to sleep.)
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who's always late — with a 'which one are you?'
variations: A Virgo's morning starts the night before: clothes laid out, coffee maker timed, tomorrow's schedule open — so the morning chaos can be elegant.
A Leo's first task in the morning is checking the mirror. Second task: posting a story. Third task: oh right, brush teeth.
